sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68200" key="mnh/sios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μνήσιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n68200.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of memory</tr_> (formed <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">like</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κτήσιος</ref> </xr>), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">58</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
